name: Adam Nameh
bio: Adam Nameh is the Co-Founder of Alphabyte Solutions Inc., a Toronto-based data and AI consulting firm that has helped over 100 clients across North America transform complex data environments into actionable business intelligence. With a decade of hands-on experience in data architecture and platform design, Adam works directly with leadership teams to deliver practical AI and data solutions that drive real business outcomes.

A graduate of the University of Toronto's Computer Engineering program, Adam served as a Data Architect at BMO Financial Group before founding Alphabyte in 2016. He is also co-founder of Parlawatch AI — featured in Maclean's and the University of Toronto Magazine — and MailSmart, an AI-powered direct mail optimization tool for Shopify merchants.

credentials.keyCoursework: Database Systems · Software Engineering · Data Structures · Machine Learning · Systems Design
